data.body: Investigate why Codex detail terminal output renders repeated '(no text)' lines and hides useful failure/assistant content. Use f354 session logs as evidence, then update Foolery's Codex event parsing/rendering so unsupported or non-text Codex events are surfaced intelligibly instead of silently collapsing into '(no text)'. Validate with focused tests and quality gates as feasible.
data.title: Fix Codex detail output visibility
